name: Server Difficulty
desc: Informs client of the server's difficulty setting.

implementation.overview: S41 tells the client the server difficulty. No module in the examined client sources (500+ folders) targets this packet.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S41PacketServerDifficulty)
modules.purpose: Server sends S41PacketServerDifficulty to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
